title: Cervicogenic headache review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Requires red-flag identification and lists myelopathic symptoms, fever, immunosuppression, weight loss, cancer, systemic symptoms, chest symptoms, and significant trauma.
assessment.rationale: Supports entered neck-pain evaluation and red flags for cervicogenic-headache review; no decision is generated.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Neck Pain – 22
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult neck-pain telehealth documentation in Dubai; partial for in-person examination, paediatric patients, and non-Dubai settings.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Requires red-flag identification and lists myelopathic symptoms, fever, immunosuppression, weight loss, cancer, systemic symptoms, chest symptoms, and significant trauma.

assessment.text: Supports onset, duration, pain character, arm radiation, paraesthesia, activity impact, posture, movement, range of motion, palpation, neurological assessment, gait, and provocative-manoeuvre documentation.
assessment.rationale: Supports neck history and clinician examination context for cervicogenic-headache review; no decision is generated.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Neck Pain – 22
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult neck-pain telehealth documentation in Dubai; partial for in-person examination, paediatric patients, and non-Dubai settings.

exact_location.heading: 7. Clinical History and face-to-face examination elements

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports onset, duration, pain character, arm radiation, paraesthesia, activity impact, posture, movement, range of motion, palpation, neurological assessment, gait, and provocative-manoeuvre documentation.

assessment.text: Provides systemic, neurologic, onset, associated-feature, and pattern-change red-flag domains.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-assessed adult headache red flags for cervicogenic-headache review; no decision is generated.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Headaches in Adults
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth headache documentation; partial because the baseline workflow has no adult-only filter and is not telehealth-only.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Provides systemic, neurologic, onset, associated-feature, and pattern-change red-flag domains.
